column1: # Source of truth for myfinance schema mapping.
#   .cursor/prompts/sync-myfinance-schemas.md     (slug + codegen tables — must match this file)
# Columns (TAB-separated, blank lines and lines starting with `#` are skipped):
#   3. slug            Conventional Commit scope when split_into_pr_per_schema=true
#   4. codegen_script  npm script in ui-myfinance/package.json (without `npm run` prefix)
# Adding a new schema also requires extending the `schema:` choice options in the
# workflow (workflow_dispatch inputs cannot be loaded dynamically) and the human-readable
# tables in the prompt. Consider a future CI guard that reconciles them against this file.
